problem id: a41a3626
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  00011111 -> 01110001
  01110100 -> 01000111
  11000010 -> 00101100
  00001001 -> 00010000
  10001100 -> 11001000
  11110000 -> 00001111
  01001000 -> 10000100
  11100101 -> 11011110
  10010110 -> 01101001

query: 10110011
predicted answer: 10111011
